system.description:
Roll +Heart when you try to understand what someone or something is really thinking.

10+: You read them like a book. Choose two questions.

7-9: Choose one: Are they telling the truth? What are they planning? How do they see me? How can I get them to trust me? How can I make them angry? How are they feeling?

results.success: You read them like a book. Choose two questions.
results.partial: Choose one: Are they telling the truth? What are they planning? How do they see me? How can I get them to trust me? How can I make them angry? How are they feeling?
